sections.thinkingParamsSubtitle: Control heartbeat, decision temperature, tool calls, LLM invocation and other core parameters
sections.memoryConfigSubtitle: Adjust memory search, management and consolidation parameters
sections.crossChannelSubtitle: Control AI's ability to sense and correlate conversations across multiple channels
sections.webToolsSubtitle: Baidu AI Search API key & web scraping proxy settings

descs.meta_decision_temperature: LLM temperature for meta-level decision tasks
descs.max_tool_iterations: Maximum tool call rounds per reply
descs.short_term_memory_size: Max cached entries for tool results and other temporary info; oldest discarded when exceeded
descs.max_conversation_size: Max conversation history entries per LLM call; older messages can be retrieved via memory tools
descs.vector_search_batch_size: Split into parallel batches when exceeding this count
descs.memory_recall_top_k: Maximum entries returned by passive memory recall
descs.memory_recall_min_score: Memories below this score won't be recalled
descs.memory_warn_threshold: Warning when single-type memory exceeds this count
descs.entity_merge_threshold: Suggest merge when entity memories exceed this count
descs.reflection_merge_threshold: Suggest merge when reflection memories exceed this count
descs.auto_consolidate_enabled: Automatically consolidate memory files during heartbeat
descs.conv_recall_scan_limit: Maximum vector scan entries for conversation recall
descs.conv_recall_backfill_batch: Embedding backfill batch size per call
descs.conv_recall_min_score: Skip historical messages below this score (0~1)
descs.cross_channel_enabled: When enabled, AI can sense related conversations from other channels during replies
descs.cross_channel_window_minutes: Only consider channel activity within this time window; older activity is ignored
descs.cross_channel_recall_min_score: Higher values are stricter; recommended 0.4-0.6 to avoid noise
descs.cross_channel_narrative_max_items: Max cross-channel narrative items shown per reply; 0 disables narrative
descs.web_proxy: Web scraping proxy, leave empty for direct, e.g. http://127.0.0.1:7890

introspection.title: Introspection
introspection.subtitle: Control AI's autonomous reflection frequency and behavior. Changes take effect immediately.
introspection.reflectMinHoursDesc: Minimum time between reflections to prevent excessive reflection
introspection.reflectMaxHoursDesc: Force reflection via heartbeat after this time, regardless of AI decision
introspection.analysisTemperatureDesc: LLM temperature for reflection units (0~1, lower = more deterministic)
introspection.minConversationsDesc: Minimum conversations needed for entity profile analysis; skip if insufficient
introspection.skipIntervalHint: Skip interval limits, execute immediately in background

units.title: Introspection Units
units.subtitle: Manage config-based introspection units (config/introspection_units/*.json). Changes hot-reload immediately.
units.promptPlaceholder: Enter reflection prompt… LLM will use this to reflect and produce memories

tasks.title: Tasks
tasks.subtitle: {{count}} executable tasks
tasks.promptPlaceholder: Enter task prompt… AI will execute this when triggered

costMap.title: LiteLLM Cost Map
costMap.subtitle: Currently loaded {{count}} models
costMap.description: LiteLLM fetches the latest model pricing/context window data from GitHub at startup. You can manually update here when network is restricted, with optional proxy support.

auth.title: Access Password
auth.subtitle: Set WebUI password. Leave empty to disable protection
auth.placeholder: Enter new password, leave empty to disable
auth.hint: Current session auto-renews; other devices need re-login
